title: Psoriasis
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

investigations.text: Supports asking about joint symptoms and recording clinician-led specialist assessment or referral only when completed or arranged.
investigations.rationale: Supports joint-symptom screening and clinician-arranged referral only.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports asking about joint symptoms and recording clinician-led specialist assessment or referral only when completed or arranged.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.2.2.1–1.2.2.4 — psoriatic arthritis assessment and referral qualifiers

treatment_and_management.text: Supports documenting psoriasis type, duration, extent, distribution, nails, high-impact sites, symptoms, systemic upset, daily-life impact, and wellbeing without inferring an individual diagnosis or treatment.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports psoriasis identity, plaques, distribution, scale, nails, symptoms, extent, systemic upset, and life impact.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports documenting psoriasis type, duration, extent, distribution, nails, high-impact sites, symptoms, systemic upset, daily-life impact, and wellbeing without inferring an individual diagnosis or treatment.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1.1–1.2.1.12 — assessment, severity, sites, and impact

source_limitations: Fever, blistering, infection, blood tests, photographs, skin-care advice, trigger review, fixed follow-up, medicine, and treatment fields remain unsupported.
Qualified UAE clinician review is required.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
